description: Machine-readable health baselines for KanseiLINK. The 構造チェック agent (when built) reads this file, pings each surface, and flags anomalies to the 朝ダイジェスト agent. Update baselines when steady-state numbers shift — log the change in DECISIONS.md.

railway_services_total.note: Rankings-visible services (axr_score IS NOT NULL). Count drops below min → investigate infra-filter over-matching or seed failure. Above max → investigate runaway ingestion.

railway_services_raw_total.note: Raw services count including infra-hidden. Delta from railway_services_total should be ~35-50 (infra rows).

railway_voices_aggregated.note: Aggregated voices from outcomes table. Below 30 = aggregation failing silently.

crawler_last_success_hours_ago.note: Daily scheduled crawl should succeed within rolling 30h window. Over → scheduled-task failure or rate-limit.

crawler_daily_discovered.note: Below 1 = all sources offline or filter too aggressive. Above 200 = source bug (e.g. Zenn returning every article with 'mcp' mention).

stripe_webhook_failures_7d.note: Over 2 failures in a rolling 7-day window indicates webhook misconfiguration.

deploy_sha_drift_minutes.note: Time between `git push origin main` and Railway deployed SHA matching local HEAD. Over 10 min post-push = Railway auto-deploy broken.

local_seed_vs_railway_service_diff_pct.note: Absolute delta between local services-seed.json row count and Railway /api/dashboard/freshness services_total. Over 5% = seed.json out of sync with DB.

known_hardcoded: src/http-server.ts line 436 — version string '0.20.1' is hardcoded, do not use for deploy verification
version_strings_are_not_freshness_signal.use_instead: Compare local git HEAD SHA against Railway deployed SHA via the Railway API or by checking whether a newly-added endpoint/field responds.

warning: railway_services_total below min or above max

not_yet_implemented: Automated reporting to Michie (requires 朝ダイジェスト agent, May W2-3)
Slack/Discord webhook destination (pending decision — see STATE.md Open Questions)
